Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Say hello to contestant number one,[n]Yukari Takeba! That's quite a bold design![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}She's really strutting her stuff! Archery practice[n]must do wonders for the self-esteem![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If no one seems to have claimed the umbrellas around[n]here, do you think we can go ahead and use them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ooh! Next up is contestant[n]number two, Fuuka Yamagishi![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wow, Fuuka, uh... Do you[n]wear swimsuits often, or...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, whoops, was it somethin' I said?[n]Didn't mean to embarrass ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, cut it out with that laugh, you creep.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And, for our final contestant of the day...[n]{f 1 1}
